FruityCandyPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_22_Payout6_1: After the payout of every round is made, all winning symbols will explode allowing the symbols above them to cascade down for a new round.
FruityCandyPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_23_Payout6_2: Additional winning combination will be tallied in every round until no more winning combination can be tallied.
FruityCandyPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_26_Payout1_0: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.
FruityCandyPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_1_Payout2_1: At the start of any main game spin, the symbols are in 5-4-5-4-5 reels and the win multiplier is x1.
FruityCandyPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_2_Payout2_2: During any spin, if there are one or more winning symbols on the reels, after wins are paid and while the new symbols are cascading down, an additional row of symbols are added.
FruityCandyPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_3_Payout2_3: The additional row of symbols will not be added to the reels when the symbols are in 8-7-8-7-8 reels.
FruityCandyPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule3_1_Payout3_1: During any spin, all wins will be multiplied by the multiplier shown above the reels, starting with x1 in the first round.
FruityCandyPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule3_2_Payout3_2: Any win in the first round will increase the second round's multiplier to x2.
FruityCandyPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule3_3_Payout3_3: Any win in the second round will increase the third round's multiplier to x3.
FruityCandyPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule3_4_Payout3_4: Any win in the third round will increase the fourth round's (and beyond) multiplier to x5.
FruityCandyPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule4_1_Payout4_1: 3 Free Spins symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Free Spins Feature with 10 free spins. Each additional Free Spins symbol will trigger 2 more free spins.
FruityCandyPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule4_2_Payout4_2: At the start of the Free Spins Feature, all multipliers above the reels will be increased to x2, x4, x6 and x10 respectively.
FruityCandyPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule4_3_Payout4_3: At the end of every free spin, 2 free spins are awarded and the multipliers above the reels are increased by 1, 2, 3 and 5 respectively for each Free Spins symbol on the reels (if any).
FruityCandyPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule5_1_Payout5_1: The maximum win amount is %{10000}x of the bet amount.
FruityCandyPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule5_2_Payout5_2: If the total win in the main game or the Free Spins Feature reaches %{10000}x of the bet amount, the spin ends.

FruityCandyRule.Rule1_1: Fruity Candy is a 5-4-5-4-5 reels combination video slot featuring expanding reels and increasing multiplier.
FruityCandyRule.Rule1_2: The game is played with 10 base bet for %{2000} ways - %{25088} ways, bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
